overlap_verdict: Likely but not publicly confirmed at subject-ID level
count_as_independent_cohort_recommendati: Unclear for DS088; Unclear for DS061 if counting IFX-response cohorts
recommended_overlap_notes: DS088/GSE73661 contains a 23-patient UC infliximab comparator sampled before and W4-6 after first IFX. DS061/GSE16879 contains UC patients sampled before and 4-6 weeks after first IFX. Designs and cohort sizes suggest the DS088 IFX comparator may be related to or reprofile a subset of the DS061 UC IFX cohort, but public GEO records use different sample IDs/platforms and no direct subject-ID crosswalk was found. Treat overlap as likely but unconfirmed; do not count DS088 IFX comparator and the DS061 UC IFX subset as independent IFX-response cohorts without manual subject-level confirmation.
